paragraphs.text: 科学课上，老师给我们每人发了一些蚕卵。我小心翼翼地拿回家，放在纸盒里。
paragraphs.translation: In science class, the teacher gave each of us some silkworm eggs. I carefully took them home and placed them in a paper box.

paragraphs.text: 过了几天，小蚕从卵里钻出来了，黑黑的像小蚂蚁。我每天给它们摘新鲜的桑叶吃。
paragraphs.translation: After a few days, little silkworms hatched from the eggs, black like tiny ants. I picked fresh mulberry leaves for them every day.

paragraphs.text: 蚕宝宝越长越大，最后开始吐丝结茧。老师说蚕丝可以用来做衣服。养蚕真有趣！
paragraphs.translation: The silkworms grew bigger and bigger, finally spinning silk and forming cocoons. The teacher said silk can be used to make clothes. Raising silkworms is so interesting!
